data.name: 異世界與獸娘姐姐的做愛生活
data.detailed_description:
就算轉生到異世界，擁有［製作道具］技能的主角還是被勇者一行當做廢物所拋棄。救下墜入谷底，快要死在路邊的主角的是隱居在森林深處的獸娘拉蒂。迷糊之中回憶起了前世，不小心叫出姐姐以後，姐姐就成了只有我能叫的稱呼。姐姐好，姐姐妙，姐姐奶大逼還緊。今天不想工作了來上一發，明天慶祝日子打上一炮。前面不夠還要後入。菊花開始和逼搶。獸人好，獸人妙，獸人耐操不怕壞。一胎又一胎，母乳停不下。轉生後的每日操逼生活開始咯。

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 獸娘姐姐帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 14個與聖天使夏洛特H的劇情。

「異世界與獸娘姐姐的做愛生活」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.name: Lewd Life with my Doggy Wife
data.detailed_description:
After getting worked to death at your office job, getting reincarnated into a fantasy world should be a dream come true, right? Well, it wasn't all sunshine and roses this time around either… Getting dragged around by the so-called Hero, fixing their gear, and getting into fights day after day isn’t any better than the days getting worked to the bone at your old office job!

Wandering alone, after getting kicked out of the hero's party, you're on the brink of death as you collapse at the foot of a mysterious figure calling out for your big sis, the only girl who ever supported you... Suddenly, you wake up in a comfy bed next to a beautiful girl with deep blue eyes, luxurious soft hair, an incredible figure, and fluffy ears and a tail!? That's right, a delicious looking demi-human doggirl has taken you in and insists that you call HER 'big sis' and that you deserve to relax and be spoiled. So let her cuddle, suck, and fuck your troubles away~

Big sis knows best after all!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Lati is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Scene Studio with a customizable prompt to create a custom scene with in-game assets
  • 14 scenes with your lovey-dovey doggirl!

Lewd Life with my Doggy Wife! Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: After getting kicked out of the hero's adventuring party and almost passing out on the side of the road, karma rewards you with a rescue from a passing doggirl! Put all that stressful "fighting for your life" behind you, kick back and take it easy with a lovey-dovey doggirl today!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
